series_metadata.series_description: Any and all documents relating to an employees ergonomic file within the agency. The file may include, but is not limited to,documents such as ergonomic assessments, recommendations, checklists and so forth. Some information contained within the forms and documents may be of a confidential nature.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: All employee ergonomic files should be sent to the agency ergonomic coordinator. Once an employee leaves the agency, retain for 2 years then destroy. ; Electronic: All employee ergonomic files should be sent to the agency ergonomic coordinator. Once an employee leaves the agency, retain for 2 years then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
